description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a tall green hedge, featuring a flat metal roof and a minimalist rectangular structure. The front yard includes a small swimming pool, two lounge chairs, a shaded gazebo, and a landscaped garden with a stone path leading to the main entrance. A carport with a metal roof shelters a blue car on the right side, while the backyard is enclosed and private. Large glass sliding doors and windows provide ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The exterior walls are clad in light gray corrugated metal, and the property is well-organized with distinct zones for relaxation, parking, and recreation. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat metal roof, large glass windows, a carport, pool, and landscaped garden, all enclosed by a tall green hedge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors, pool, lounge chairs, gazebo, garden, and carport with a blue car.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the pool, gazebo, and the side of the bungalow with visible windows and garden features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall of the bungalow, carport, and the enclosed backyard with minimal visible landscaping.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the carport, blue car, garden path, and the rear and side windows of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
